name: Egg Foo Yong
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thickened.
2. Stir in the bean sprouts, pork, onions, and soy sauce.
3. Heat oil in a skillet.
4. Pour some of the mixture into the skillet at a time.
5. Using a spatula, push the egg as it cools over the meat to form a pattie.
6. When the pattie is firm, flip it to brown the other side.
7. Serve with sauce.
